    ...

    con.rollback()

con.close()

Hints: BEGIN; insert; insert duplicado; except rollback; Tras rollback count 0. selfcheck.question: Un 400 Bad Request del proveedor debe…
selfcheck.chosen_text: Tratarse como error de cliente (no retry ciego)
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Skeptic: retry/backoff only for transient (429, 503, timeouts). 400/404 are not retried — treat as client error.

selfcheck.question: ¿Dónde debe vivir el token de API?
selfcheck.chosen_text: En variable de entorno / secret store
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Skeptic: Bearer/token from environment/secret store, never hardcoded; missing secret fails closed.

selfcheck.question: SQL con f-string e input de usuario es…
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Skeptic: prohibited to build SQL with f-strings from user input — injection risk; use placeholders ?.

selfcheck.question: Enviar document_id bancario a un geocoder público…
selfcheck.chosen_text: Viola la política de egress de CP-N1-C
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Skeptic: authorized/mock geocoder only; do not send bank PII (docs, accounts, amounts) to public providers — violates CP-N1-C egress policy.

selfcheck.question: 1.2 km entre dos entidades sintéticas implica…
selfcheck.chosen_text: Una geoseñal de relación, no un veredicto
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Skeptic: Haversine km is a relationship geoseñal, not kinship or confirmed fraud verdict.

retrospection.note: Knowledge limited to sequential packets through active section.
